name: Hôpitaux Universitaires de Genève (HUG) - Cluse-Roseraie
notes: Main campus. Largest university hospital in Switzerland. 8 public hospitals + 2 clinics + 40 outpatient units.

name: HUG - Hôpital de Beau-Séjour
notes: Rehabilitation and orthopaedics.

name: HUG - Hôpital de Bellerive
notes: Palliative care and rehabilitation. ~8km from Genève station.

name: HUG - Hôpital de Loëx
notes: Rehabilitation. ~8km west of Geneva centre.

name: HUG - Hôpital des Trois-Chêne
notes: Acute geriatric care and rehabilitation. On Belle-Idée estate.

name: HUG - Hôpital de Psychiatrie (Belle-Idée)
notes: Main psychiatric hospital for Canton de Genève. On Belle-Idée estate.

name: Clinique de Genolier
notes: One of Switzerland's largest private clinics. Oncology, orthopaedics, cardiology. ~5km from Gland station.

name: GHOL - Hôpital de Nyon
notes: Internal medicine, surgery, oncology, maternity, emergency. 6 operating rooms.

name: GHOL - Hôpital de Rolle
notes: Specialised in pulmonology.

name: Hôpital de Prangins (CHUV)
notes: Psychiatric hospital (CHUV West sector). Near Nyon.

name: EHC - Hôpital de Morges
notes: 3rd largest maternity in canton. Acute care, surgery, emergency.

name: EHC - CTR Aubonne
notes: Rehabilitation and treatment centre. ~7km from Allaman station.

name: Centre Hospitalier Universitaire Vaudois (CHUV)
notes: One of 5 Swiss university hospitals. Cantonal and inter-cantonal vocation.

name: CHUV - Hôpital Beaumont
notes: Part of CHUV campus.

name: CHUV - Hôpital de Cery
notes: Psychiatric hospital (CHUV). University psychiatry department.

name: Hôpital Ophtalmique Jules-Gonin
notes: Specialised ophthalmic hospital.

name: Clinique de La Source
notes: Major private clinic. Member of Swiss Leading Hospitals.

name: Hirslanden Clinique Bois-Cerf
notes: Founded 1685. Orthopaedics, surgery, gastroenterology. 5 operating theatres.

name: Hirslanden Clinique Cecil
notes: Private clinic. Same building as Hirslanden emergency centre.

name: Clinique de Montchoisi
notes: Part of Swiss Medical Network. Ophthalmology and surgery.

name: Hôpital Riviera-Chablais (HRC) - Rennaz
notes: Main acute care site since Nov 2019. 24/7 emergency. Between Villeneuve and Aigle.

name: HRC - Site de Vevey Providence
notes: Geriatric and rehabilitation clinic (CGR Riviera). Medical emergencies.

name: Fondation de Nant
notes: Public psychiatric care for East Vaud (Lavaux-Oron / Riviera / Aigle districts).

name: Clinique CIC Montreux
notes: On Lake Geneva shore. Part of CIC Suisse network.

name: Clinique Valmont
notes: Founded 1905. Part of Swiss Medical Network. Rehabilitation.

name: Hirslanden Clinique La Colline
notes: Downtown Geneva. 20+ specialties. International patients.

name: Clinique Générale-Beaulieu
notes: Founded 1899. Champel district. Part of Swiss Medical Network.

name: Clinique des Grangettes
notes: Hirslanden. Maternity, oncology, cardiology, paediatrics.

name: Clinique Châtelaine (Maisonneuve)
notes: First Geneva private clinic dedicated to rehabilitation and post-acute care.

name: Centre Médical d'Epalinges
notes: Part of CHUV network.

name: Clinique Suisse de Montreux
notes: Private clinic in Montreux centre.

name: Swiss Riviera Medical Center
notes: Near Montreux station.
